key_insight: SINO combines spectral initialization with iterative time-domain refinement to unify high-accuracy forward simulation and inverse PDE inference in one neural operator architecture.
engineering_relevance: It offers a practical surrogate for expensive PDE solvers, enabling faster many-query workflows such as real-time prediction, parameter sweeps, super-resolution imaging, and weather forecasting.
method: Frequency-domain starter module learns globally stable low-frequency structure.
Time-domain iterator module reduces local residuals through iterative refinement.
Designed to collaborate across spectral and spatiotemporal representations for complex PDEs.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports strong results on Navier-Stokes and acoustic wave equations, plus applied tests in super-resolution imaging and weather forecasting, with improved accuracy, generalization, and robustness.
watch_item: Performance may depend on how well the frequency and time-domain components are balanced, especially for complex boundaries or long-horizon dynamics.
paper_title: Starter-Iterator Neural Operator: A Unified Architecture for High-Fidelity Forward and Inverse PDE Problems
